text:
Issue CANEEDS-670
Summary: Notifications Not Sent Since Aug 3–4
Section: description
*Requestor:* Christopher Hawkins *Description:* Since approximately August 3rd or 4th, no sellback offers have shown as "notification sent." Previously, it was rare for notifications not to send, assuming customers had opted in. This issue affects *every sellback offer* received since that date. *Impact:* * At least one customer reported not receiving a notification despite a reply being sent. * Potential for multiple customers to be unaware of responses, impacting experience and trust. *Steps to Reproduce:* # Submit a sellback offer as a customer. # Respond to the offer from the system. # Check if notification status updates or if the customer receives the notification. *Expected Result:* Notification should be sent and logged as "notification sent." *Actual Result:* No notifications are sent or logged for any sellback offers since Aug 3–4. *Date First Noticed:* Around August 3–4, 2025.

text:
Issue CANEEDS-590
Summary: AODA - WP5 - Gap Assessment
Section: description

Issue CANEEDS-294
Summary: Create script to upload / sync email templates.
Section: description
I would be easier to manage the email templates if there was a script to upload and replace the existing email templates. The email templates are currently in a google bucket. form_handler_email_templates They are also in the ca-form-handler-gcp github repo: [https://github.com/ingka-group-digital/ca-form-handler-gcp/tree/main/email_templates] The script would be an npm script that during deployment would upload the email templates if there are any to the google bucket. This would remove the manual process of having to do this.
